product.name: 2.5K Wireless Home Security Cameras 2-Pack, Outdoor WiFi Non-Subscription AI Person Detection, 4MP Color Night Vision, Full Duplex 2-Way Audio, IP66 Waterproof Battery Powered, U.S. AWS Cloud
features: 【Lifetime Free AI Detection & Alerts】This security cameras wireless outdoor is with non-subscription AI person detection, minimizing false alerts from pets or moving objects. The built-in siren light alarms and real-time alerts will be activated upon detected events. Easily share access with family for complete security coverage.

【2.5K 1440P & Full-Color Night Vision】This wireless outdoor camera features 2.5K 1440P Quad HD resolution and a 4MP lens, delivering sharp, detailed images. Security camera indoor/outdoor with full-color night vision ensures clear footage even in darkness.

【100% Wire-Free & Flexible Installation】This wifi camera outdoor wireless camera boasts a powerful 5200mAh rechargeable battery for long-lasting, wire-free use. With 2.4G WiFi connectivity, it enables smooth real-time monitoring and remote App access. Its magnetic camera base allows easy installation, ideal as a wireless security camera system, whether indoors or outdoors.

【Weatherproof & Two-Way Audio】 Outdoor waterproof wifi camera built with IP66 technology, withstands various weather conditions, ensuring reliable performance year-round. It’s also equipped with a built-in microphone and speaker for real-time two-way audio and one-touch call communication. Easily chat with family through our mobile app, making this wireless camera a vital component of your home security system for total protection

【Encrypted & Flexible Storage Solutions】This indoor outdoor camera wireless supports encrypted local video storage into microSD cards of up to 256GB (not included). Optional cloud storage based on U.S. cloud is also availble. We provide a 2-year warranty and a free hotline on weekdays for any product issues.
